productDisplayName: John Miller Men Stripes White Shirts
description: CompositionBlue striped shirt made of a cotton blend fabric, has a spread collar with a fron buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron directly on decorationThis striped shirt from john miller adds a fresh twist to everyday formal clothing with its breathable fabric and fashionable cuts. Look dapper in this beautifully designed shirt, while the fabric offers a flattering silhouette and keeps you fresh all day. Pair this with formal pants, leather shoes and classy accessories.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
